sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35194" key="e)ndialu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνδιαλύω</orth>, <sense id="n35194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loosen, disperse</tr_> a clot of blood, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
